---
name: Course / Feature Request 💡
about: Suggest an idea, a new lesson, or a new subject for Tech Nexus
title: '[REQUEST] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What area of Tech Nexus does this apply to?**
(e.g., Coding Academy, Student Notes, AI Hub)

**Describe the feature or course you'd like to see**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. 

**Why is this important?**
Explain how this new content or feature will benefit the learners using Tech Nexus.

**Are you willing to help build this?**
- [ ] Yes, I can help write the content/code!
- [ ] No, I am just requesting it.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or references to similar courses/ideas here.
